_comment: Coverage-gap wave 3 decks. Centers the 10 still-uncovered T3 cards in coherent, realistic drafts. Stages chosen so cards are seen at >1 difficulty where natural (boss1 loop-10, loop15, boss2 loop-20, boss3 loop-30).

decks.label: Agility armor-tempo bulwark (warrior)
decks.notes: Centers the three cheap (1s) low-cd agility armor+haste cards: Veil of Steps (14 armor), Footwork Stone (12 armor), Galeguard (10 armor). Haste stacking accelerates the cheap attack openers (Quickstep, Flurry Step, Jab) into a Berserker's Ledger finisher. Front-loaded cheap stamina cards keep the 50-pool fed; armor buys time vs doom_knight's 9-dmg swings.

decks.label: Agility armor-tempo bulwark (loop15)
decks.notes: Same agility armor-tempo core at a harder normal-enemy band (loop15, mult 1.1) so Veil of Steps / Footwork Stone / Galeguard are seen at >1 difficulty. Tests whether cheap armor+haste tempo still sustains when enemy damage scales up.

decks.label: Poison-bruiser armor hybrid (warrior)
decks.notes: Hybrid bruiser around Soaking Blade (12 + 2 poison + 7), Mire Cleave (10 + 8 armor + 2 poison), and Magmaplate (16 armor, Brace: 14 + 2 burn). Cheap physical openers (Jab, Reckless Strike) build pressure while armor/poison from the assigned cards sustains and chips. Mire Cleave is the only both-resource card; rest are stamina so the 50 pool carries it. vs doom_knight.

decks.label: Poison-bruiser armor hybrid (boss2)
decks.notes: Same poison-armor bruiser core vs iron_golem (boss2, armor-affinity ratchet) so Soaking Blade / Mire Cleave / Magmaplate are tested at a second, harder difficulty where the Pierce-light physical damage must grind through a defensive boss. Mire Cleave armor + Magmaplate brace damage matter most here.

decks.label: Slow-control bulwark (warrior)
decks.notes: Slow/control shell around Static Bleed (4 slow + 3), Galebrand (8 + 3 slow + 2 burn), Glacial Pact (4 slow + 8 armor, Vengeance more). Slow throttles enemy cd (8%/stk) to buy time while cheap attacks and a scaling finisher close. Glacial Pact and Galebrand are both-resource; the rest is stamina so warrior's 50 pool sustains the slow uptime. vs doom_knight.

decks.label: Slow-control bulwark (boss3)
decks.notes: Same slow-control core vs lizard_king (boss3) to see Static Bleed / Glacial Pact / Galebrand at a deeper boss difficulty where pure soft-control must stretch the fight long enough for chip damage to win without a hard burst finisher.

decks.label: Burn-to-bleed detonator (mage)
decks.notes: Built so Brine Crucible (consume all burn -> 2 bleed per burn) has a fat burn pool to convert. Cheap burn feeders (Spark, Pyre, Flame Dart, Pyre Surge doubler) stack burn before the detonator fires; Galebrand adds burn+slow. Burn appliers are mana/both so it runs as mage on the 60 pool. Brine Crucible placed mid-order so the burn pool is built first (fixed-order engine). vs doom_knight.
